title: Expression and purification for cryo-EM samples of FIP200NTD:ATG13(363-517)-ULK1(MIT) complexes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1k6n7","text":"Expression and purification for cryo-EM samples of FIP200NTD:ATG13(363-517)-ULK1(MIT) complexes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Transfect HEK GNTi cells at concentration of 2 × 10^6 cells/ml
In a separate tube, dilute DNA with Hybridoma-SFM(1X)
Add PEI to DNA dilution. Incubate mixture for 00:30:00 at 37 °C
Add mixture to cells. Let cells grow for 48:00:00
Wash pellet with cold PBS. Store pellet at -80 °C until purification.

Cell pellets were lysed at room temperature for 20 min with lysis buffer (25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 200 mM NaCl, 2 mM MgCl2, 1 mM TCEP, 10% Glycerol) with 5 mM EDTA, 1% Triton X-100 and protease inhibitor cocktail (Thermo Scientific) for 00:15:00
Clarify lysate for 17000 rpm, °C, for 00:35:00 at 4 °C .
Wash strep-tactin resin (IBA Lifesciences, Germany) into lysis buffer (without Triton). Load clarified lysate onto resin
Rock supernatant with equilibrated Strep-Tactin Sepharose resin for 01:00:00 at 4 °C
Wash with 5CV lysis buffer (25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 200 mM NaCl, 2 mM MgCl2, 1 mM TCEP, 5 mM EDTA, 10% Glycerol)
Elute with lysis buffer plus 4 mM desthiobiotin for STREP resin
Concentrate elution and inject onto pre-equilibrated Superose 6 Increase 10/300 GL column (Cytiva) (25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 1 mM TCEP)
Pool peak fractions, concentrate, snap freeze, and store at -80 °C
creator: Minghao Chen
